import React from "react"; import { useCart } from "../context/CartContext"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; import "../index"; // 👈 create this new file const Cart = () => { const { cartItems, updateQuantity, removeFromCart, getTotal } = useCart(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleCheckout = () => { navigate("/checkout"); }; const shippingCost = 50; // ₹50 default return (
{/* LEFT SIDE */}

Shopping Cart {cartItems.length} items

{cartItems.map((item) => (

{item.category || "Product"}

{item.name}

{item.quantity}
₹{item.price * item.quantity}
))} ← Back to shop
{/* RIGHT SIDE */}

Summary

Items {cartItems.length} ₹{getTotal()}
Shipping
Give Code
Total Price ₹{getTotal() + shippingCost}
); }; export default Cart;
